title: Shyam Singha Roy
desc: A director accused of plagiarism finds a transcendental connection to his past life when he digs deeper into his subconscious mind.

title: Shyam Singha Roy
desc: A director accused of plagiarism finds a transcendental connection to his past life when he digs deeper into his subconscious mind.

title: Yashoda
desc: Surrogate mother Yashodha is advised to follow a few guidelines to keep herself and her baby healthy and safe. However, something happens at the surrogate centre that puts both of them at risk.

title: PK
desc: An innocent alien lands on Earth but loses his communication device. However, he meets Jaggu, a heartbroken reporter, and tries to find his device with her help.

title: Saamy
desc: Aarusaamy, a police officer, accepts bribes from Perumal, a gangster, in order to maintain peace in his district. However, circumstances force him to go against Perumal.

title: Poojai
desc: A temple priest gives evidence in court about a murder that he has witnessed. Unfortunately for him, he bears witness against an influential landlord.
